title: Steel and More
description: The mod adds steel, vertical slabs with slabs with minecraft blocks that were not. With glass and panes with a frame in each type of wood.
body:
The mod adds steel armor with tools like sword, pickaxe, axe, shovel, etc. There is also a steel block made up of 9 steel ingots.

The mod mainly adds new slabs with blocks that didn't have them, as well as vertical slabs.

If you are looking for new slabs in minecraft, it's here. Also, in the next version, there should be all the missing tiles. And later, stairs, half slabs, and even more content that will come over time.


If you encounter any bugs, feel free to join my discord or leave a comment.

Language available:

English, Spanish: by translation
French: by romaine_tv20
Brazilian Portuguese: by Kazuya79H
